_readme: Each entry needs a 'platform' (greenhouse/lever/ashby) and the exact board 'token'/slug. Tokens below are STARTER GUESSES -- verify each one before relying on it (see instructions below), since tokens change and not every company listed is confirmed live. To verify: open the URL pattern shown in that source file (e.g. scraper/sources/greenhouse.py) with the token filled in, in your browser. If you get job JSON back, it's correct. If you get an error, search '<company name> careers greenhouse' or check their careers page footer/source for the real link. Add/remove entries freely -- this file drives both the source list AND the 'good company' ranking boost.
_v2_note: Previous version leaned on generic big-name US companies (Coinbase, Reddit, Robinhood) that mostly hire US-only and at senior levels -- wrong fit for a 1-year-experience, India-based, remote-preferred search. This list instead prioritizes (a) India-headquartered product companies/startups, and (b) companies explicitly known for remote-first, globally-open hiring. Still verify tokens -- board slugs change and not all of these are confirmed live.
